name: FishFlip
description: FishFlip – Fast, Fun Fish Tapping Adventure! Dive into the splashy fun of FishFlip, an exciting and addictive tapping game where playful fishes pop out of a pot and it’s your job to catch them before they disappear! Stay alert and keep your fingers ready. Every time a fish flips out of the pot, quickly tap it to score points. But be careful—fishes pop up faster and faster as the game goes on, testing your speed, reflexes, and focus.
